CheckTitle: Conditional Access enforces Every Time sign-in frequency for Intune Enrollment
Description:
Microsoft Entra **Conditional Access** for **Microsoft Intune Enrollment** enforces the session control **sign-in frequency** set to `Every time` for all users.

This evaluates whether an active policy targets the Intune Enrollment app and requires reauthentication on each enrollment attempt.
Risk:
Absent `Every time` reauth at enrollment, attackers with stolen or replayed credentials can enroll rogue devices and obtain compliant access.

Impacts:
- Confidentiality: data exposure from unauthorized devices
- Integrity: untrusted endpoints modifying resources
- Availability: persistence via device-based access paths

Code.Other:
1. Sign in to Microsoft Entra admin center (entra.microsoft.com)
2. Go to Protection > Conditional Access > Policies > New policy
3. Users > Include: select All users
4. Target resources (Resources/Cloud apps) > Select resources: choose Microsoft Intune Enrollment
5. Session > Sign-in frequency: select Every time
6. Enable policy: On
7. Create the policy

Recommendation.Text:
Implement a **Conditional Access** policy on the **Intune Enrollment** app that sets sign-in frequency to `Every time` and applies broadly.

Combine with **MFA** and device **compliance** requirements, use **least privilege** exclusions sparingly, and monitor sign-in/audit logs to strengthen **defense in depth**.
